$comment: Canonical scripts to merge into each sub-repo's package.json. Drop-in keys: check:size, check:debt, check:dups, check:deps, check:agents, check:coverage, check:all (aggregator), test:ci, prepare. Sub-repo may extend (e.g. check:bundle-size in burrow) without dropping any of these. The toolkit's README.md (§8 'package.json wiring') documents merge order and adaptation points.

scripts.check:all: bun run check:size && bun run check:debt && bun run check:dups && bun run check:deps && bun run check:agents && bun run check:coverage

notes.check:all: Chains the individual check:* commands in a fail-fast sequence. Sub-repos that also produce a bundle (burrow) append `&& bun run check:bundle-size:build` at the end after porting check-bundle-size.ts.
notes.check:dups: Runs jscpd via bunx; no devDep needed. Config lives in .jscpd.json at the sub-repo root (copied from templates/l5-toolkit/configs/.jscpd.json).
notes.check:coverage: Wraps `bun test --coverage` and enforces the floors in scripts/coverage-budgets.json. Lives outside the check:all aggregator only because some sub-repos prefer running coverage as a separate CI job for caching reasons — keep it inside if your CI is monolithic.
notes.test:ci: Emits both coverage/lcov.info and test-results/junit.xml so report-test-timing.ts and report-quality-metrics.ts can render their CI step-summary panels.
notes.prepare: Idempotent: skips on a non-git checkout (e.g. inside a Docker build context). After install, runs `git config core.hooksPath scripts/hooks`, which makes scripts/hooks/pre-commit fire on `git commit`.
notes.devDependencies: knip is required for check:deps. jscpd runs through `bunx` (no install). Sub-repos that need a structured logger (plot, mulch, seeds) additionally add pino + pino-pretty per AGENTS.md.
